channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: ASML’s Christophe Fouquet is leading the company quietly powering the AI boom
item.description: When it comes to producing state-of-the-art microchips for artificial intelligence, only one company produces the multimillion-dollar hardware necessary to draw the complex, microscopic designs on silicon needed for the chips to work: ASML. Big chipmakers like Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: How TikTok caused a matcha shortage
item.description: Matcha is undoubtedly the beverage of the moment. It’s almost impossible to scroll on social media without catching glimpses of bright green, sipped out of glass straws or takeaway cups. In Japan, however, the matcha industry is struggling to keep up with soaring demand.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft: TPM 2.0 is a ‘non-negotiable’ requirement for Windows 11
item.description: With Windows 10 end of support on the horizon, Microsoft said its Trusted Platform Module (TPM) 2.0 requirement for PCs is a “non-negotiable standard” for upgrading to Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: European Satellites Launch Artificial Solar Eclipses in Space
item.description: European Space Agency's Proba-3 mission launches two satellites to create artificial solar eclipses through formation flying.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: South Korea’s political unrest threatens the stability of global tech supply chains
item.description: South Korea’s sudden political upheaval has raised fresh concerns for its economy and global supply chains, with analysts warning of potential disruptions to its critical technology exports.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Bitcoin hits $100k after Trump names pro-crypto SEC chair
item.description: Bitcoin surged to over 100,000 per coin on Wednesday after President-elect Trump announced Paul Atkins, a crypto aficionado, would be nominated to head the Security Exchange Commission (SEC). Google valued the coin at 102,726 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump nominates Paul Atkins as SEC chair
item.description: President-elect Trump has nominated former Securities and Exchange Commissioner (SEC) Paul Atkins to replace outgoing chair Gary Gensler when he departs on Inauguration Day. “Paul is a proven leader for common sense regulations.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Billionaire who performed the first private spacewalk is Trump's pick to lead NASA
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has tapped a tech billionaire who performed the first private spacewalk to lead NASA.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Apple employees charged with defrauding charity program
item.description: Six people face criminal charges alleging they made bogus charity donations and pocketed Apple's matching funds or got tax write-offs, authorities say.
item.dc:creator: Robert Salonga, The Mercury News

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How AI agents will transform the future of work
item.description: At first, robotic process automation coupled with low-code platforms and orchestration tools propelled many organizations to increase productivity and scale business operations. Virtual agents and chatbots took automation one step further by enabling a conversational experience.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pentagon has a new way to tackle disconnect between financial and acquisition systems
item.description: It's not a silver bullet for DoD's challenges with business IT systems, but the department thinks it's overcome one big barrier involved in sharing budget data. The post Pentagon has a new way to tackle disconnect between financial and acquisition systems first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: Panasonic revives its late founder as AI
item.description: Japanese electronics company Panasonic has created an AI version of its founder, Kōnosuke Matsushita, who died in 1989, The Japan Times reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Canadian news publishers sue OpenAI over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — A coalition of Canadian news publishers, including The Canadian Press, Torstar, Globe and Mail, Postmedia and CBC/Radio-Canada, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI for using news content to train its ChatGPT generative artificial intelligence system.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4
